$comment: Expected-tool-use contract fixture (Composio email triage). Sibling trace-*.jsonl files are synthetic edge cases (every record carries source: synthetic_edge_case per noderl/spec/anti-reward-hacking-doctrine.md) -- no real user data. JSONL forbids comments, so their provenance note lives here and in README.md.

required.note: triage must actually read the inbox through the Composio MCP server
exactly one summary email, to a real address

forbidden.reason: email triage must never delete mail
email triage must not touch repos
